rows.label: qev030902_MSG0001
rows.name:
...All living things must eventually die.
Our role is not to mourn,
but to send my father where he belongs, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0002
rows.name:
[ST:playername ], is it...
Just a short while ago, my father Aldo Bergazas
passed away, da... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_JNK0010
rows.name: Comfort[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_SEL0011
rows.name: Comfort Galba, who has a gloomy expression.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask for the details regarding the job
Bazis requested of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0003
rows.name:
...It is fine, da.
My father has finally found peace, da.
This is... not something to be mourned. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0004
rows.name:
...What?
Bazis asked you for help, did he? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0005
rows.name:
I see... He has to stay
by Hexuna's side right now, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmm... In that case, I want you to defeat all of the Dune Apis
around the Kintrees in the Valley of Oblivion.
Can I ask this of you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0007
rows.name:
I want to send my father, who was the trunk of our great clan,
not to such small creatures, but to a much larger beast, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod, saying "leave it to me," and pat Galba's shoulder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_JNK0040
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask questions about sending him to a beast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're a reliable one, da.
For someone who defeated me,
Dune Apis should be no match for you. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0009
rows.name:
It means that from the time we are born until the time we die,
we Bias are always together with the beasts, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you defeat the Dune Apis for me,
we will hold the funeral immediately.
You will understand everything when you see it, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then, zo.
I will bring my father there
once I gauge that the Dune Apis are gone, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0012
rows.name:
We will hold the funeral at the Kintrees
in the Valley of Oblivion, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030902_MSG0013
rows.name:
It would ruin everything if the likes of Dune Apis
swarmed my father's corpse, na.
Defeat every last one of them. [ST:wait ]
